working_on.feature: Zalo Login Flow + Complete Profile + Phone Update
files: ZMA: src/pages/dashboard.tsx (personal info card + add phone button)
working_on.notes: All features working. Ready for deploy + testing.

pending_tasks.task: Deploy backend + ZMA and test full flow
pending_tasks.notes: git commit + push (backend had merge conflict, now resolved)

pending_tasks.task: Fix Coolify VPS: SSL + 502 Bad Gateway

recent_changes.description: Updated implementation-plan.md: Sprint progress ~55%, Zalo OAuth marked DONE, added new features to completed list, detailed actual OAuth flow with IP restriction explanation
Split complete-profile into 2 pages: /complete-profile (refCode only for new users) + /add-phone (SĐT update from dashboard). Added route in layout.tsx.
Fixed merge conflict in auth.service.ts caused by accidental git commit --amend. Resolved both conflict blocks (zaloLogin refCode + completeProfile $transaction).
Fixed completeProfile merge logic: unique constraint violation on zaloId. Changed order to DELETE new member FIRST (free zaloId), THEN update old member. Wrapped in Prisma $transaction for atomicity.
Fixed 401 error on PATCH /auth/complete-profile: JWT strategy returns req.user.id (not req.user.sub). Controller was using req.user.sub → undefined → Prisma findUnique failed.
Implemented full Zalo login flow: ZMA getUserInfo() → backend find/create member → JWT. Dashboard personal info card with + Add Phone button. Complete profile page for refCode.

errors_encountered.error: completeProfile 500: unique constraint violation on zaloId during merge
errors_encountered.solution: Must DELETE new member FIRST to free zaloId, THEN update old member. Use $transaction.
JWT strategy returns req.user.id (from member spread), NOT req.user.sub. Changed controller to use req.user.id.

errors_encountered.error: Git merge conflict after commit --amend on already-pushed commit
errors_encountered.solution: Resolved merge conflicts manually, committed fresh. Lesson: don't amend after push.
RESOLVED: ZMA getUserInfo() client-side bypass. Backend only uses oauth.zaloapp.com.

decisions_made.decision: Zalo login → NO phone collection at login time
decisions_made.reason: getPhoneNumber() requires Vietnam server. User adds phone later from dashboard.

decisions_made.decision: New user redirect to /complete-profile for refCode only
decisions_made.reason: User wanted refCode input for new members, but skip phone

decisions_made.decision: Separate /add-phone page instead of URL params
decisions_made.reason: ZMP Router doesn't properly support query params in navigate(). Dedicated route is cleaner.
Endpoint handles both refCode-only (from login) and phone-only (from dashboard) cases

decisions_made.decision: Merge logic: DELETE first, UPDATE second in $transaction
decisions_made.reason: Prevents unique constraint violation on zaloId. Atomic ensures both succeed or both rollback.
